title: Host Contact Attitudes
entries: I hate [PC],and I wont give [[PC]/the party] the time of day, unless they pay up front (5gp/minute)
Why would I help [PC], unless of course [PC] is offering something in return?
I am willing to help [PC], but they'd need to persuade me
Will do anything [PC] asks, no explanations or renumerations needed
I hate [PC's] guts
I never really liked [PC]
We did try to kill each other that one time…
I do not remember [PC] in the slightest
I tolerate [PC], they'll get no special treatment
I could lend a hand maybe I guess, but what's their name again?
We are amicable but not necessarily amenable
Sure, for the right (high) price in gold
Yes, but first they'd need to help me do a thing that’s… a little dark
Yes, but they'd need to help me get this thing first
Yes, but they'd need to help me resolve a personal issue first
Yes, but they'd need to cover some expenses
Yes, but they'd have to join my guild
Wish I could help, but it’s impossible now because magical restrictions
Wish I could help, but it’s impossible now because social issues
Yes, but they'd need to help me resolve a personal issue after
I would do anything for [PC], but I won’t do that
Any time, but they'd owe me one
I would do anything for [PC]
I've heard of [PC] and their deeds, and I'm wary of them
I've been burned by [PC] before, so they better have a good reason to see me
[PC] owes me a favor; this could be their chance to repay it
I respect [PC], though we've never met. Their reputation precedes them
I'm neutral about [PC]. We had our differences, but that's in the past
I admire [PC] from afar but never had the courage to approach them
[PC] saved my life once, so they have my eternal gratitude
We were rivals once, but time changes everything
[PC]? The troublemaker? They'll have to prove their sincerity first
I used to look up to [PC], until they disappointed me
I've always been curious about [PC], now might be the time to get to know them better
[PC] and I share a deep bond, but recent events have strained it
I've got a soft spot for [PC], but I won't admit it easily
[PC] and I share some secrets, so they better tread carefully
[PC] is like family to me, though we've had our ups and downs
I'm indebted to [PC], so I'm bound by honor to assist them
We've crossed paths before. [PC] needs to make it worth my while this time
[PC] was kind when no one else was; I owe them kindness in return
I've got no love lost for [PC], but business is business
I was once in love with [PC], those feelings might still linger
[PC] and I share a complex history; it won’t be straightforward
We had a mutual friend. If [PC] mentions them, I might be more receptive
I've tried to forget [PC], but fate keeps bringing us together
[PC] once stood up for me; I'd do the same for them now
I've always been envious of [PC], but envy can be set aside
